quotes: Confident, not boastful — first-of-its-kind significance stated clearly and directly, never overstated or sensationalized.
Warm, not overly emotional — genuine empathy about DM's daily impact; patients at the center.
Clear, not complicated — plain, respectful language; easy to understand without losing accuracy.
Tone may flex slightly by context; core voice never changes.

rules.intent: Maintain consistent, patient-centered brand voice and tone across all communications.
rules.rule_text: Lisraya communications must follow the core brand voice principles: Confident, not boastful (state first-of-its-kind significance directly, never sensationalized); Warm, not overly emotional (genuine empathy about DM's daily impact); and Clear, not complicated (plain, respectful language). Tone may flex slightly by context, but core voice never changes.
